title: Dorsk 82
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Dorsk_82.png]] |name=Dorsk 82 |homeworld=[[Khomm/Legends|Khomm]] |birth= |death=[[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] |species=[[Khommite/Legends|Khommite]] [[Cloning/Legends|(clone)]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Genderless]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=Yellow |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] *[[New Jedi Order]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Why are you helping us, sir?''"
''"Because I am a Jedi and I can. You don't deserve destruction.|[[Unidentified 3D-4 administrative droid|3D-4]] and Dorsk 82|''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]''}} '''Dorsk 82''' was a [[Khommite/Legends|Khommite]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of [[Dorsk 81]] from [[Khomm/Legends|Khomm]]. After the martyrdom of his predecessor and the devastating assault on Khommite civilization by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]], Dorsk 82 decided to leave his homeworld behind and pursue the path of a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. ==Biography== ===Life on Khomm=== When [[Dorsk 81]] left [[Khomm/Legends|Khomm]] to pursue Jedi Knighthood, Dorsk 82 stayed behind and took his place in the [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] center. Dorsk 81 later came back to Khomm before he and [[Kyp Durron]] snuck into the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] to find out what the [[Imperial Remnant]] was doing. Dorsk 82 tried to convince Dorsk 81 to stay, but Dorsk 81 knew he had to follow his duty. When the Imperial Forces later attacked Khomm as a show of their power, Dorsk 82 was on his way home from the Cloning Center. The attack and the lack of defenses on Khomm was the first step in Dorsk 82's own quest to become a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] After overseeing the training of [[Dorsk 83|his replacement]] at the cloning center, Dorsk 82 departed for [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. ===Jedi Knight=== [[File:Dorsk_82.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Dorsk 82 at the grave of Dorsk 81]] {{Quote|I want to learn to fight like that!"
"Then I'll help you to become a Jedi—but don't expect it to be easy!|Dorsk 82 and Kyp Durron|''[[Star Wars: Jedi Academy: Leviathan]]''}} Though he attended the [[Jedi Praxeum]], he was plagued by doubts as to his worthiness and ability to become a Jedi. He was taken under the wing of the extremely talented but repentant Kyp Durron and formed a solid friendship with him. Together, along with [[Kirana Ti]] and [[Streen]], they took part in the mission to [[Corbos]], where they defeated the [[Leviathan (creature)|Leviathan]], an ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] creature. During this mission, Dorsk rediscovered himself and gained confidence in his own abilities. Dorsk was later promoted to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. He attended the wedding of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] in [[20 ABY/Legends|20 ABY]] along with many other members of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], where he raised his yellow [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] in congratulations. ===Yuuzhan Vong War=== [[File:Dorsk82wed.jpg|thumb|125px|Dorsk 82 at the wedding of Luke and Mara Jade Skywalker]] {{Quote| I do not intend to be destroyed.|Dorsk 82|}} During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Dorsk was killed by an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] in the city [[Imthitill]]. He was attempting to protect a crowd of thirty-eight [[Droid/Legends|droids]] from a mob wanting to [[Invasion of Ando (Yuuzhan Vong War)|appease]] the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Standing alone against the mob, he tried to reason with them. When a security [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] arrived with the local enforcement agency, it appeared he might be able to resolve the situation in an attempt to pacify the Yuuzhan Vong. Instead, the Aqualish destroyed the ship (including its [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Hhen]] and 38 droids) when they found out it contained no other Jedi. Wanting to capture him alive to hand over to the Vong, Dorsk 82 refused to surrender and was eventually cut down by [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire. He died without fear, however, in true Jedi fashion. During the mission to Corbos, Dorsk 82 used a blue-bladed lightsaber, however by the time of Master Skywalker's wedding, he used a yellow-bladed lightsaber. ==Behind the scenes== In ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' Dorsk 81 is mistakenly said to have been killed twice, on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] and then again on [[Ando/Legends|Ando]]. The Dorsk who died on Ando was actually Dorsk 82. ==Appearances== *[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}} *[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 1|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 1]] *[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 2|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 2]] *[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 3|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 3]] *[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 4|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 4]] *[[Union 2|''Union'' 2]] *''[[Young Jedi Knights: Return to Ord Mantell]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Dorsk 82}} *{{InsiderCite|35|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth}} {{C|Concept art; picture only}} *{{GalaxyCite|13|The Jedi Poster}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] *{{InsiderCite|57|Who's Who in the New Jedi Order}} *{{FactFile|102|JED 11-12|Jedi Field Equipment}} {{Po}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Updated and Expanded]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Dorsk 82 |es=Dorsk 82 |pt=Dorsk 82 }} [[Category:Force-sensitive clones]] [[Category:Genderless individuals]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Jedi Knights of the New Jedi Order]] [[Category:Khommites]] [[Category:New Republic individuals]]
